provenance.fit_source: base_transient_bytes, act_bytes_per_token_hidden_layer_ckpt, and attn_bytes_per_head_token2 fitted (OLS) from 5 Qwen3-8B-4bit kernel-impl train_step marginal peaks (grad_checkpoint=True, seq 1024-8448, RMSE 0.21 GB); act_bytes_per_token_hidden_layer_full fitted from 2 grad_checkpoint=False points; cross-model validated on Llama-3.2-3B-4bit within +/-9%. optimizer_bytes_per_param is analytic AdamW (two fp32 moments). attn_bytes_per_head_token2 is bf16-calibrated (dtype folded in). naive_loss_bytes_per_nv unchanged (prior gate-artifact fit). The linear activation term under-models nothing new; the quadratic attention term is the one-layer O(N^2) SDPA backward that dominates peak training memory at long context.
